title: Mechanicum (pre-Heresy)
dogma: All is Mechanism — the universe itself is a great machine
specialty: Pre-Heresy technological dominion across the Sol System
lore: The Mechanicum was the pre-Heresy precursor to the Adeptus Mechanicus — a vast techno-theocratic empire centred on Mars that commanded the greatest concentration of scientific knowledge in human history.

During the Great Crusade the Mechanicum provided the Emperor's forces with Titans, warships, and weapons of terrible power. Its Fabricator-General sat at the Emperor's right hand on the Council of Terra.

The Horus Heresy shattered the Mechanicum. Kelbor-Hal's pact with the Warmaster split it in two: the Loyalist Mechanicum that would become the Adeptus Mechanicus, and the Dark Mechanicum that fell to Chaos and fled to the Eye of Terror.
